name: Fried Tortilla Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Stack the corn tortillas and cut into 6 equal wedges.
2. Pour about half an inch of salad oil into a deep, 2 or 3-quart pan. Heat to medium-high heat.
3. When the oil is hot enough to sizzle a piece of tortilla, add the pieces by handfuls and stir to separate them.
4. Cook until crisp for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes.
5. Use a slotted spoon to lift the chips from the oil and drain on paper towels.
